title: Bet of the Day - Fix Moneyline Model Mirroring
description: Debug and fix why Pete Engine moneyline model mirrors market (edge = 0%). The model_probability equals implied_probability, giving no edge.

spec.problem: Pete Engine returns NO_BET because model_probability = implied_probability, giving 0% edge
spec.expected: Model should detect real edge vs market using injury-adjusted probability weighting
acceptance: Tested against historical games with known outcomes

steps: Debug why moneyline model mirrors market - check brain/best_bet.py probability calculation
Add injury-adjusted probability weighting to model
Re-run validation to ensure proper edge detection
